insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only gain valuable knowledge but also establish a foundation for building a streak and improving your scores. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can break down your goals into manageable tasks and develop a growth mindset that will help you overcome initial challenges and achieve success in the long run.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
